sources.approval_reason: Official Wikimedia dump chunk with published license terms and checksum files; sample is capped below the Phase 1A download limit.
sources.attribution_requirements: Preserve article-level attribution through Wikimedia page or history links in manifests and reports.
sources.documented_retrieval_method: Use one official Turkish Wikipedia pages-articles split chunk from https://dumps.wikimedia.org/trwiki/latest/ and verify the matching checksum before sampling.
sources.estimated_download_size: about 357 MB for the selected split chunk
sources.jurisdiction_warning: Reuse must comply with CC BY-SA 4.0/GFDL attribution and share-alike requirements.
sources.notes: Prefer current articles only; remove markup, tables, templates, user pages, and non-article namespaces before tokenizer use.
sources.redistribution_requirements: Redistribution must preserve license notices and share-alike obligations for modified text.
sources.source_name: Turkish Wikipedia pages-articles official dump split

sources.approval_reason: Official Tatoeba export with explicit sentence license; useful only as a small sentence-style supplement.
sources.attribution_requirements: Keep source attribution to Tatoeba and preserve sentence IDs when retained in manifests.
sources.documented_retrieval_method: Use official Tatoeba exports from https://tatoeba.org/en/downloads and filter to Turkish/English sentences only.
sources.estimated_download_size: official export size varies by snapshot; sample cap is enforced before use
sources.jurisdiction_warning: User-contributed sentences require attribution review and duplicate filtering.
sources.notes: Do not use audio, profile data, comments, or private metadata; keep only text sentence exports.
sources.redistribution_requirements: Redistribution must preserve CC BY attribution information and source references.

sources.approval_reason: Official Python documentation with explicit documentation license; useful for English technical prose and code-adjacent examples.
sources.attribution_requirements: Preserve Python documentation attribution and source URL in manifests.
sources.documented_retrieval_method: Use official Python documentation pages or archives from https://docs.python.org/3/ for a pinned Python 3 version; record exact URLs and hashes before any future download.
sources.estimated_download_size: selected text documentation archive expected below 100 MB
sources.jurisdiction_warning: Code examples and documentation have separate license notes; preserve both in manifests.
sources.notes: Strip navigation chrome, generated indexes, and duplicated API pages before tokenizer use.
sources.redistribution_requirements: Redistribution must preserve the PSF documentation license and any relevant example-code license notices.
sources.source_version: Python 3 docs snapshot pinned before retrieval

sources.approval_reason: Official Python documentation translation hosted by docs.python.org; useful for Turkish technical prose.
sources.attribution_requirements: Preserve Python documentation attribution and Turkish documentation source URL in manifests.
sources.documented_retrieval_method: Use official Turkish Python documentation pages from https://docs.python.org/tr/3/ for a pinned Python 3 version; record exact URLs and hashes before any future download.
sources.estimated_download_size: selected Turkish documentation pages expected below 100 MB
sources.jurisdiction_warning: Translation coverage can differ by version; pin exact pages and remove duplicate navigation.
sources.notes: Use only official docs.python.org Turkish pages; avoid unofficial mirrored translations.
sources.redistribution_requirements: Redistribution must preserve the PSF documentation license and any relevant example-code license notices.
sources.source_version: Python 3 Turkish docs snapshot pinned before retrieval
